V-M-054.checks: Usage event, session, rollup, last-seen, and abuse-signal persistence is idempotent, bounded, and secret-free.
V-M-054.commands: planned: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_mtproto_usage_telemetry.py tests/test_db_migrations.py -v

scenarios.scenario-1: Known assignment handshake updates last_seen and creates/updates a session without storing secrets.
scenarios.scenario-2: Unknown and rejected SNI events are stored with safe reason codes and masked identifiers.
scenarios.scenario-3: Hourly, daily, and monthly rollups preserve traffic, connection count, duration, and error counters.
scenarios.scenario-4: Duplicate runtime event ids do not double-count usage.
